ItacAcademyItem.Name: Racchiusi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Description of the emblem is in Negro, Il ritratto segreto (2004), p. 54. Maylender does not report this information, but affirms that the emblem of the Academy is visible in the Ms. Casanatense 1028.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
